zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY於大約1251年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼時，他的父親Hugues II de PARTHENAY28歲，母親Valence Eustachie Valérie de LUSIGNAN27歲。他於1267年與Jeanne de MONFORT在法國多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1315年5月29日在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY于大约1251年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼时，他的父亲Hugues II de PARTHENAY28岁，母亲Valence Eustachie Valérie de LUSIGNAN27岁。他于1267年与Jeanne de MONFORT在法国多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1315年5月29日在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY was born about 1251, in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Hugues II de PARTHENAY, was 28 and his mother, Valence Eustachie Valérie de LUSIGNAN, was 27. He married Jeanne de MONFORT in 1267, in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 29 May 1315, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY est né environ 1251, à Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Hugues II de PARTHENAY, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Valence Eustachie Valérie de LUSIGNAN, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de MONFORT en 1267, à Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 mai 1315, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY um 1251 in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues II de PARTHENAY 28 und seine Mutter Valence Eustachie Valérie de LUSIGNAN 27. Er hat 1267 in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Frankreich Jeanne de MONFORT geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Mai 1315 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.Vouvant,85305,Vendée,Pays de la Loire,FR: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 보우반트
ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY(이)가 대략 1251년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 데우스-스e브레스 파르테나이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues II de PARTHENAY(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Valence Eustachie Valérie de LUSIGNAN(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1267년 프랑스 데우스-스e브레스 파르테나이에서 Jeanne de MONFORT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1315년 5월 29일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Vouvant,85305,Vendée,Pays de la Loire,FR: фоувант, вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume VI de PARTHENAY родился около 1251 г. в местности партенеи, деукс-сeвресь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues II de PARTHENAY было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Valence Eustachie Valérie de LUSIGNAN, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de MONFORT в 1267 г. в местности партенеи, деукс-сeвресь, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 мая 1315 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.
